Q: The number of people who attended the first and second game of the 2009 Nanking soccer league was 27,000 and 31,000 respectively. If the number of people who attended the third game is 3000 more than twice the number of people who attended the second game, find the number of people who attended the third game.

A: Let the number of people who attended the third game be x. According to the given information, 2x+3000=31,000+27,000. Therefore, x = (34,000-3000)/2 = 15,500.
